archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Command Center / Tactical Minimalism)
design_philosophy: Mission-critical, high-tech, and trustworthy. The interface must feel like a modern SOC (Security Operations Center) or high-end telemetry dashboard. Uses a strict Bento Grid layout with crystal glassmorphism surfaces over deep obsidian backgrounds to highlight critical safety alerts. Every color choice is semantic (Active, Accident, Offline, Warning).

hierarchy.telemetry_value: font-mono text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold text-white tracking-tighter

rules: Use JetBrains Mono specifically for all telemetry data (Speed, G-Force, GPS coordinates) to reinforce the technical/precision feel.
Never use Inter or Roboto for headings or body.
Overlines and small headers must be uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]).

glassmorphism.classes: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] rounded-2xl
glassmorphism.usage: Use for all Bento Grid telemetry cards, the Critical Alerts Center, and the Sidebar List.

map_overlay_glass.classes: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-lg rounded-xl
map_overlay_glass.usage: Use for floating controls or legends directly over the Leaflet map.

interactive_card.classes: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl cursor-pointer

layout.container: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] p-2 sm:p-4 gap-4
layout.sidebar: w-full max-w-sm flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col gap-4

bento_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 h-full
bento_grid.map_span: col-span-full lg:col-span-8 row-span-4 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-white/10 relative
bento_grid.alerts_span: col-span-full lg:col-span-4 row-span-4 flex flex-col gap-4
bento_grid.telemetry_row: col-span-full lg:col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 h-48

layout.spacing: Use tight gaps (gap-4) for the Control Room density. Internal padding for bento cards should be p-5 or p-6.

motion.alerts: animate-pulse for critical red alerts, drawing immediate attention to the operator.
motion.list_items: staggered entrance animations for driver list and alert history.

map.markers: Use custom HTML markers with glowing pulses matching semantic colors (Green/Red/Gray).

critical_alert_center.behavior: Visual pulsing red border + sound cue (simulated or actual Audio API). Needs 'Acknowledge' and 'Mark as False Alarm' actions.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/20 hover:bg-red-500/30 text-red-500 border border-red-500/50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(239,68,68,0.2)]
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/40 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

image_urls.description: Dark, moody high-tech motorcycle helmet context image

rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure React + Tailwind CSS + Lucide Icons.
Implement the layout strictly as a Bento Grid. No standard boring bootstrap columns.
Use react-leaflet for the map with the provided CartoDB Dark Matter tile layer to ensure it matches the dark theme.

Simulate real-time WebSocket updates via a `useEffect` interval that slightly randomly modifies speed/G-force and triggers an occasional 'Accident/Impact' alert to demonstrate the Critical Alert Center.
Include an audio alert (using browser Audio API or just a visual simulated pulse) when an impact is registered.
Ensure 'Glassmorphism' is achieved cleanly: `bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10`. Do not use opaque grays.
Use the specific fonts: Chivo for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, JetBrains Mono for telemetry numbers.
Add standard data-testids to the main interactive pieces.
